title: 7 natural remedies to help alcoholics with cirrhosis using herbal teas
description: Taraxacum officinale teas, also known as dandelion root tea, have been traditionally used to help manage cirrhosis, a condition where the liver becomes scarred and unable to function properly. The tea is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and hepatoprotective properties. The main constituents, including sesquiterpene lactones and phenolic acids, help to reduce liver inflammation and protect liver cells from damage. Taraxacum officinale teas a...
